query:largest_side_gap_label.answer_hint: set "answer" to the exact visible age-group label as a string
query:largest_side_gap_label.annotation_hint: set "annotation" to the [x0,y0,x1,y1] pixel box around the two bars in the answer row

query:smallest_nonzero_side_gap_label.answer_hint: set "answer" to the exact visible age-group label as a string
query:smallest_nonzero_side_gap_label.annotation_hint: set "annotation" to the [x0,y0,x1,y1] pixel box around the two bars in the answer row

query:left_side_at_least_threshold_count.answer_hint: set "answer" to the requested integer count
query:left_side_at_least_threshold_count.annotation_hint: set "annotation" to an array of [x0,y0,x1,y1] pixel boxes, one around the two bars for each counted age-group row

query:left_side_at_most_threshold_count.answer_hint: set "answer" to the requested integer count
query:left_side_at_most_threshold_count.annotation_hint: set "annotation" to an array of [x0,y0,x1,y1] pixel boxes, one around the two bars for each counted age-group row

query:right_side_at_least_threshold_coun.answer_hint: set "answer" to the requested integer count
query:right_side_at_least_threshold_coun.annotation_hint: set "annotation" to an array of [x0,y0,x1,y1] pixel boxes, one around the two bars for each counted age-group row

query:right_side_at_most_threshold_count.annotation_hint: set "annotation" to an array of [x0,y0,x1,y1] pixel boxes, one around the two bars for each counted age-group row

query:combined_total_at_least_threshold_.annotation_hint: set "annotation" to an array of [x0,y0,x1,y1] pixel boxes, one around the two bars for each counted age-group row

query:combined_total_at_most_threshold_c.annotation_hint: set "annotation" to an array of [x0,y0,x1,y1] pixel boxes, one around the two bars for each counted age-group row

query:left_side_largest_value_label.answer_hint: set "answer" to the exact visible age-group label as a string
